backend/main.mo: Motoko actor implementing user registration with email/phone validation, OTP generation using current timestamp, and OTP verification with a 5-minute expiry window.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping implemented features (neon UI redesign, hero section, about section, services, etc.) to their corresponding source files, components, and test IDs.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Auto-generated JSON document summarizing each frontend source file's purpose, used as a build planning reference for the Akshar Learning Hub project.
frontend/index.css: Root Tailwind CSS entry file defining OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for light and dark theme color tokens used throughout the UI.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the Akshar Learning Hub app with SEO metadata, Poppins/Nunito Google Fonts preloading, and the Vite React root mount point.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that manages hash-based routing between the home page (all sections assembled) and the Payment page, wrapped in QueryClientProvider.
frontend/src/assets/generatedImages.ts: Centralized export mapping named keys to generated image asset paths, covering both new Akshar-specific images and legacy assets.
frontend/src/components/About.tsx: About section component displaying four neon-accented highlight cards (discipline, attention to detail, life skills, confidence) alongside an image and placeholder parent/student testimonial quotes.
frontend/src/components/activities/Lette: An interactive alphabet grid component that plays phonics sounds for each letter when clicked and displays a word example for the active letter.
frontend/src/components/activities/Pronu: Displays a grid of word cards sourced from word lists, allowing users to hear phonics-based pronunciation and practice saying each word.
frontend/src/components/activities/Sound: A quiz game component where users identify which word starts with a given sound, tracking score and progress across all questions in soundGames data with feedback and a completion screen.
frontend/src/components/activities/WordC: A card component that displays a word with its emoji and a button to audibly play the word using the audioHelper utility.
frontend/src/components/AksharPhonics.ts: Empty file with no content, likely a placeholder for a dedicated Akshar Phonics section component.
frontend/src/components/AksharTuitions.t: Empty file with no content, likely a placeholder for a dedicated Akshar Tuitions section component.
frontend/src/components/Contact.tsx: Renders a contact section with cards for phone, WhatsApp, and address information for Akshar Learning Hub, including direct call and pre-filled WhatsApp message links.
frontend/src/components/Downloads.tsx: Displays a tabbed downloads section with free, signup-gated (OTP-verified), and paid educational materials, handling download actions with toast notifications and a payment navigation callback.
frontend/src/components/Features.tsx: Empty file with no content or exports.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Renders the site footer with brand info, quick navigation links, program listings, and contact details, supporting smooth scrolling and home navigation from a payment page.
frontend/src/components/Gallery.tsx: Empty file with no content or exports.
frontend/src/components/Header.tsx: Fixed responsive header with logo, desktop nav links, an 'Enroll Now' CTA button, and a mobile hamburger menu, with scroll-aware styling and support for navigating back from the payment page.
frontend/src/components/Hero.tsx: Full-screen hero section with animated entrance, headline, description, stat badges, and CTA buttons for Akshar Learning Hub, featuring decorative gradient blobs.
frontend/src/components/Illustration.tsx: Empty file with no content or exports.
frontend/src/components/LearningStrategi: Empty file with no content or exports.
frontend/src/components/OTPModal.tsx: A multi-step modal dialog that collects user name, email, and phone, sends an OTP via a registration mutation, and verifies it before granting download access.
frontend/src/components/Payment.tsx: A payment page component that displays a UPI QR code, copyable UPI ID, and step-by-step instructions for completing payment and contacting via WhatsApp.
frontend/src/components/Services.tsx: Renders a grid of five educational service cards (tuitions, phonics, maths, mentoring, scholarship prep) with icons, descriptions, and grade ranges.
frontend/src/components/Testimonials.tsx: A carousel-style testimonials section displaying student and parent quotes with navigation controls and decorative background elements.
frontend/src/components/WhatsAppButton.t: A fixed floating WhatsApp button that opens a pre-filled WhatsApp chat link when clicked.
frontend/src/data/soundGames.ts: Defines the SoundGameQuestion interface and exports an array of six quiz questions, each asking the user to identify which of four words starts with a given letter sound.
frontend/src/data/wordLists.ts: Exports a wordLists object containing easy (3-letter) and medium (4-letter) word sets, each with the word, its individual letters, and an associated emoji.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: A hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor (authenticated or anonymous) using React Query, and invalidates dependent queries whenever the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an InternetIdentityProvider and useInternetIdentity hook for managing DFINITY Internet Identity authentication, including login, logout, and persisted identity state.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Exports React Query hooks for backend interactions: registering a user, verifying an OTP, and fetching all users via the ICP actor.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet that imports Poppins and Nunito fonts, defines CSS custom properties for light/dark themes and neon accent colors, and declares Tailwind utility classes for animations, neon glows, and borders.
frontend/src/lib/utils.ts: Exports a cn utility function that merges Tailwind CSS class names using clsx and tailwind-merge.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that renders the React app wrapped in QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/src/utils/audioHelper.ts: Provides utility functions for phonics-based audio playback using the Web Speech API, including letter sounds with example words, word pronunciation, and success/encouragement sounds. Exports a phonics map, letter-to-emoji/word examples, and async play functions.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending the default theme with custom OKLCH-based semantic colors, neon accent colors, Poppins/Nunito fonts, custom border radii, box shadows, and keyframe animations for the Akshar Learning Hub frontend.
project_state.json: Tracks the overall project state for the Akshar Learning Hub website, including version metadata, architectural notes (simulated OTP, UPI payment redirect), required images, and a list of all implemented features across the frontend.
